event: secondary to adult polycystic kidney disease
found on both urine and blood culture
immunosuppression consisted of tacrolimus and prednisolone
serum blood glucose level had risen to 50 mmol/L
transferred to the critical care unit
antibiotics switched to piperacillin and tazobactam
patient was subsequently intubated and ventilated
percutaneous drainage of the collection within the right kidney
E. coli was cultured from the minimal pus aspirated
infection in both sides had improved
ventilatory and inotropic requirements initially reduced
organ support was not required beyond the sixth post-operative day
histological examination of the kidneys revealed inflammatory changes consistent with infection
continues to have occasional urinary tract infections
18 months later, he has a serum creatinine of 200 μmol/L
diabetes mellitus is well controlled on metformin
